full_text:
Cheng Xu 程緒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Xu (程緒)was born in Dai. Protested against attacking Gongsun Zan. Liu Yu executed him. Cheng Xu was affiliated with Liu Yu. Cheng Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
